title: 10 best herbal tinctures for lower back pain
description: St John's wort tinctures helps with lower back pain because it has natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties that can effectively relieve tension and discomfort in the muscles and joints. The flavonoids and hyperforin present in St John's wort work to reduce swelling, ease muscle spasms, and promote relaxation, allowing for improved range of motion and reduced stiffness.
